column1: The minister, ________ was appointed just last week, made no comment on the situation.
Isn't that the spot ________ the accident happened last night?
The human brain, ________ weighs about 1400 grammes, is ten times the size of a baboon's.
There are several reasons ________ I don't want to see Michael tonight.
The new girl in our class, ________name is Alexandra, seems really nice.
The Titanic, ________ people said was unsinkable, sank on her maiden voyage.
All the people to ________the e-mail was sent replied.
April 1st, ________ we play tricks on people, is known as April Fools' Day.
Harry Hill, ________ new series starts next week, is one of my favourite comedians.
A very popular breed of dog is the German Shepherd, ________ is often used as a guard dog.
Blackpool Tower, ________ was modelled on the Eiffel Tower, is a very well-known landmark.
